content:
Task task-028 completed: Created the Analytics Dashboard Screen with all required components:

**KPICards Component** (src/components/analytics/KPICards.tsx):
- Today's hours with stopwatch icon and accent color
- This week's hours with calendar icon
- This month's hours with chart icon
- Streak (consecutive days with entries) with fire icon
- Responsive 2x2 grid layout (2 columns on all devices)
- Loading states with spinners
- Uses useDailyTotals (30 days for streak), useWeeklyTotals (1 week), useMonthlyTotals (1 month)
- Motivational subtitles based on progress

**GoalProgress Component** (src/components/analytics/GoalProgress.tsx):
- Overall monthly goal with large progress bar and percentage
- Achievement badge when goals are met
- Days remaining in month display
- Required daily pace calculation ("Need X h/day to reach your goal")
- Per-category goals as smaller progress bars with category color dots
- Category names resolved via useCategories hook
- Empty state prompting users to create goals
- Uses useGoalProgress hook for calculations
- Color-coded progress bars based on completion percentage

**AnalyticsScreen** (src/screens/AnalyticsScreen.tsx):
- Scrollable dashboard layout with section headers
- Responsive grid (2 columns on tablet/desktop, 1 on phone)
- Pull-to-refresh functionality
- KPI cards section at top (Overview)
- Goal progress section
- Activity charts section with:
  - Daily Chart (Last 7 days)
  - Weekly Chart (Last 4 weeks)
  - Monthly Chart (Last 6 months)
  - Activity Heatmap (hour/day distribution)
- Empty state tip for new users
- Loading states via ChartContainer
- Export added to screens/index.ts

All components follow existing patterns with theme tokens, proper TypeScript types, and pass lint checks.

Commit: 3e233bc [task-028] Build Analytics Dashboard Screen with KPIs, goal progress, and charts
